PreToolUse.description: Block writes to .env, secrets, and migration files
PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(env|secret|key|pem)$|migrations/|secrets/"; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot write to $FILE — use Secret Manager" >&2; exit 1; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Run vendor lock-in check after code changes
PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'cd /home/user/.github/kyrk-projekt && grep -rn "^import httpx\|^import anthropic\|^from google\|^import firebase\|^import requests\|^import boto3" services/*/app/api/*.py services/*/app/ports/*.py 2>/dev/null && echo "VENDOR LOCK-IN DETECTED" >&2 && exit 1 || true'

Stop.description: Run all guard tests before reporting task complete
Stop.command: bash -c 'cd /home/user/.github/kyrk-projekt && python -m pytest tests/ services/admin-web/tests/ --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -5'
